title: Session lessons tools for recording and listing lessons learned during collab sessions
purpose: Provides tools to add lessons to and list lessons from markdown files within session document folders, supporting structured learning capture during collaborative work.
module_context: Exports lesson category and interface types, schema definitions for lesson operations, helper functions for file path resolution and existence checks, and tool functions for adding and listing lessons.

steps.content: Construct the absolute file path to the LESSONS.md file for the given project and session.
Use the project root, session name, and standard collab directory structure to determine the path.
Attempt to access the specified file path.
IF the access operation succeeds, return true.
Generate the current date and time in ISO format.
Convert the ISO string to a readable format with space instead of 'T' and truncate to include only date and time.

methods.name: addLesson
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, lesson: string, category: LessonCategory): Promise<AddLessonResult>

steps.content: Determine the file path for the lessons markdown file.
Ensure the documents directory for the session exists.
IF the lessons file does not exist, create it with a header.
Append a new lesson entry with timestamp and category to the file.
Read the updated file content to count the number of lessons.
Return a result object indicating success, lesson count, and a message.
Determine the file path for the lessons markdown file.
IF the lessons file does not exist, return an empty lessons list and zero count.
Read the content of the lessons file.
Parse the content using a regular expression to extract lesson entries.
Construct lesson objects with timestamp, category, and content from the parsed matches.
Return a result object containing the lessons and their count.
